message:
fix(clippy): merge identical if-blocks in runtime_telemetry compliance snapshot

The `total_kill_switch_trips > 0` and `!active_violations.is_empty()` branches
both returned `Some(FailureClass::Safety)` — merged with `||` to fix clippy's
`if_same_then_else` lint.
